notes: Spec 38 promoted the inline security note into a top-level `## Security model` section per the spec 36 template, wrapped `gh pr view --json url,title,body` output in `<untrusted_pr_body>` boundary tags, and switched both `gh pr create` and `gh pr edit` to `--body-file` so PR body content never reaches argv. W011 is heuristic on `gh pr view` and persists regardless of mitigations. Severity `high` was confirmed by CI on commit `f21c5fd`: this PR was opened with W011 still recorded at `medium` (the local scanner was not run because `SNYK_TOKEN` was not available locally), CI then flagged the `medium` → `high` escalation as a regression, and the baseline was refreshed in this PR to match the scanner output.
